falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 rises by 5% from current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant upward move would contradict the pattern's implied bearish bias, invalidating the HOLD signal.
Extremely low volatility would refute the blowoff score's implication of heightened market stress, disproving the current pattern's validity.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage drops below 60% by day 14
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A substantial decline in pattern similarity would indicate the current setup no longer aligns with the bottom_2024_aug template, falsifying the 85% match claim.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
